summary: Vertical video set to music with no speech. A marble bust of George Washington is composited in black and white against engravings of the founding era: colonial workers splitting rails, a cannon and a battlefield figure, and mounted soldiers with raised swords. The overlay 'REMEMBER WHO YOU ARE' recurs throughout.

script.scene: Near-black frame with a marble bust of George Washington rising from the bottom; centered overlay 'REMEMBER WHO YOU ARE.'
Washington statue composited in front of an engraving of colonial workers splitting logs/rails in a clearing; slogan persists.
Same statue against the rail-splitting engraving, slightly tighter; 'REMEMBER WHO YOU ARE.'
Statue composited over a Revolutionary War engraving with a cannon and a figure on a battlefield.
Statue against an engraving of mounted Revolutionary-era soldiers with raised swords; slogan held.

notable_text: One Homeland. One People. One Heritage.
